error_signature: all stock prices recorded into TSLA tab
title: All stock prices recorded into the same Google Sheets tab
symptom: When attempting to write multiple stock prices to different tabs in Google Sheets, all prices are recorded in the TSLA tab instead of their respective tabs.
applies_when: Writing multiple stock prices to different tabs
not_this_if: Only one stock price is being recorded
root_cause: The Google Sheets node processes items in batches by default. If the batch size is greater than 1, it may not correctly route each stock price to its corresponding tab, leading to all prices being written to the first tab.
fix_steps: Open the Google Sheets node settings
agent_instruction: Set the batch size to 1 in the Google Sheets node settings.
